description_long: This is a tall, A-frame wooden ladder with a dark brown finish, featuring five evenly spaced horizontal rungs between two sturdy, tapered side rails. The ladder is constructed from solid wood, giving it a robust and traditional appearance suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The side rails are straight and converge at the top, forming a stable triangular profile when viewed from the front or back. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or locking mechanisms, and the base of the ladder rests directly on the ground. The wood grain is visible, adding a natural texture to the surface, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional. This ladder is likely intended for temporary access to elevated areas, such as for maintenance or repairs in urban settings.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden A-frame ladder with five horizontal rungs and a sturdy, traditional design. The wood grain and tapered side rails give it a robust, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing five evenly spaced rungs and the full width of the A-frame structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ladder's slim profile and the angle of the A-frame legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all rungs and the converging side rails visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the depth of the ladder.
